notes: explicit delegation language; expect near-100% fire

messages.content: we need google login, stripe subscriptions, and email receipts before friday

That's doable. I'd suggest this order: Google OAuth first (it unblocks user accounts), then Stripe Checkout with a webhook for subscription status, then transactional email via Resend. Want me to start with the OAuth setup?
honestly I don't have time to babysit this all week. is there a way to just get a person to do it? I'd rather pay someone
